---
title: "Projects & Software"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: _data/software.json
  type: table
  sort: ["title asc"]
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, description, language]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Package"
    description: "Description"
    language: "Language"
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
invisible(try(targets::tar_read(site_software_json), silent = TRUE))
```

Open-source tools and packages I have developed or maintain. For the
complete picture, see my [GitHub profile](https://github.com/tarensanders).
